description_long: This is a modern single-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a minimalist design. The exterior features a mix of stone and wood paneling, complemented by a spacious patio area and a fenced-in swimming pool. The property is landscaped with several mature trees, shrubs, and a driveway with a parked vehicle. Outdoor amenities include a picnic table, lounge chairs, and a small garden area. The house has an open-plan layout visible through the expansive windows, with a clear division between living and dining spaces. The main entrance is accentuated by a paved walkway and is flanked by greenery, providing a welcoming approach.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, stone and wood exterior, landscaped yard, and a fenced pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with a vehicle, and lush landscaping with multiple trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked vehicle, and a clear look at the patio and outdoor dining area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced swimming pool, large windows, and backyard seating area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, pink-blossomed tree, and the open patio space.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single modern door, paved walkway, no steps, and surrounded by landscaped greenery.
